refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns a sub-seq of a given range

refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.parameters;
index
The index at which the sub-seq starts.
If positive, the seq will start at that index in the seq. If negative, the seq will start that far from the end.
length
If a length is given and is positive, the resulting seq will have up to that many values in it.
If the length results in an overflow, only values up to the end of the seq will be included.
If a length is given and is negative, the seq will stop that many values from the end.
If a length is not provided, the resulting seq will contain all values between the index and the end of the seq.

&reftitle.returnvalues;
A sub-seq of the given range.
